description: Logic or data patterns that appear more than once across the FSM system and may indicate duplication or need convergence.

candidates.title: Dual service_plan_tables migration names
candidates.description: Both '2026_04_02_000100_create_service_plan_tables.php' and '2026_04_02_000800_create_service_plan_tables.php' share the same filename pattern. The 000800 migration is an additive extension pass using Schema::table with hasColumn guards. This is intentional but the identical name pattern is a maintenance hazard.
candidates.recommendation: Intentional — but consider renaming 000800 to 'extend_service_plan_tables' for clarity in future passes.

candidates.title: originatingSale() computed methods vs. Eloquent BelongsTo relationships
candidates.description: ServiceAgreement, ServicePlan, and ServicePlanVisit all declare originatingSale()/originatingSaleAgreement() computed methods that manually query Quote/ServiceAgreement rather than using Eloquent relationships. This duplicates logic now covered by the new originatingQuote() and saleAgreement() BelongsTo relationships added in this pass.
candidates.recommendation: The computed methods can be simplified to delegate to the new BelongsTo relationships in a follow-up refactor pass. Do not remove yet — the computed methods add additional filtering/fallback logic.

candidates.title: Dispatch readiness evaluated in multiple services
candidates.description: Readiness evaluation for dispatch exists in DispatchReadinessService, DispatchConstraintService (evaluateAvailability), VehicleDispatchService, StockDispatchService, and AgreementDispatchService. While these are intentionally specialized, the readiness score computation (readiness_score column on service_jobs) may be computed in overlapping ways.
candidates.recommendation: DispatchReadinessService should be the single aggregator. Other services should feed scores into it rather than directly computing readiness_score. Converge in a future dispatch intelligence pass.

candidates.title: Coverage logic spread across EquipmentCoverageService, ServiceAgreement helpers, and ServicePlan helpers
candidates.description: EquipmentCoverageService (app/Services/Work/EquipmentCoverageService.php) computes agreement coverage. ServiceAgreement also has coveredEquipment(), coverageTimeline(), recurringCoverageSummary() methods. ServicePlan has coverageEquipment(), recurringCoverageScope(). This creates multiple paths to coverage resolution.
candidates.recommendation: All coverage resolution should flow through EquipmentCoverageService. Model helpers can call the service or return raw relationships. Converge in a contract/coverage hardening pass.
